text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
Medicare FFS Claims (version L) Codebook │ May 2026 │ V 1.15 
175 
FST_DGNS_E_VRSN_CD 
LABEL: 
First Claim Diagnosis E Code Diagnosis Version Code (ICD-9 or ICD-10) 
DESCRIPTION: Effective with version “J,” the code used to indicate if the diagnosis E code is ICD-9 or ICD-10. 
SHORT NAME: FST_DGNS_E_VRSN_CD 
LONG NAME: FST_DGNS_E_VRSN_CD 
TYPE: 
CHAR 
LENGTH: 
1 
SOURCE: 
— 
VALUES: 
Blank = ICD-9 
9 = ICD-9 
0 = ICD-10 
COMMENT: 
With
